title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
At a gathering hosted by Marina Greg, various guests arrive at a renovated Victorian-era house in Bermuda. Mr. and Mrs. Ackroyd join Jason and Blackie Preston for drinks, while a bewildered clergyman arrives and is attended to by Miss Jelinski. The Bucher couple also arrives; the clergyman praises Mrs. Bucher's past diligence as a secretary for an organization. During the arrivals, Heather Badecock delivers a tedious speech, and Mrs. Alcock expresses discomfort and suspicion regarding vodka.

Amidst the social interactions, Marina Greg experiences a moment of intense, frightening shock while staring at a wall near the stairs, though she quickly regains her composure and offers Jason a Kir Royale. Seeking to see the house's renovations, Mrs. Bantry, Mrs. Alcock, and Mrs. Blunt take a tour of the bathrooms. They attempt to peek into the bedrooms, but find all the doors have been locked by the owner. While walking back, Mrs. Bantry observes Mrs. Mivet and Shelley chatting cheerfully outside.

The atmosphere shifts when a commotion is heard near the stairs. Miss Jelinski hurries past the group, noting that the bedroom doors are locked and that someone is seriously ill. Jason Radcliffe is seen on the phone, and Miss Jelinski reports that Heather Badecock's condition is very bad, suggesting she may be suffering from a heart or brain attack, or an epileptic fit.
